response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with exposure to geospatial data and distributed systems. However, their recent work lacks deep focus on C++/Rust or routing/navigation systems, which are core to this role. Their geospatial and low-latency experience is relevant but requires further validation for this specific domain.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data (e.g., GISCollective, Open Green Map) and distributed systems
Proven track record in low-latency and high-performance systems (e.g., Dlang, asynchronous I/O, caching)
Strong open-source contributions and full-stack problem-solving mindset
concerns: Limited recent experience with C++ (primary language for the role) or Rust (acceptable alternative)
Geospatial experience is more web/mobile-focused rather than routing/navigation pipelines
Current work emphasizes AI-agent infrastructure and TypeScript, diverging from routing tiling requirements
